---
title : "Teaching {{Tolerance}} in a {{Globalized World}}"
date : "2018-01-01"
author : "NA"
categories : ["Book"]
publication : "  In Andrés Sandoval-Hernández, Maria Magdalena Isac & Daniel Miranda: , 4. Cham: Springer International Publishing [https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-319-78692-6](https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-319-78692-6). ISBN: 978-3-319-78691-9 978-3-319-78692-6"
publication_short : "  In Andrés Sandoval-Hernández, Maria Magdalena Isac & Daniel Miranda: , 4. Cham: Springer International Publishing [https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-319-78692-6](https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-319-78692-6). ISBN: 978-3-319-78691-9 978-3-319-78692-6"
abstract : "(Abstract not available)"
abstract_short : ""
about:
  template: marquee
  links:
    - icon: NA
      href: NA
---


::: {.callout-note title="How to cite this work"}

NA (2018). *Teaching {{Tolerance}} in a {{Globalized World}}*.   In Andrés Sandoval-Hernández, Maria Magdalena Isac & Daniel Miranda: , 4. Cham: Springer International Publishing [https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-319-78692-6](https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-319-78692-6). ISBN: 978-3-319-78691-9 978-3-319-78692-6

:::
